channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cohere launches a family of open multilingual models
item.description: Cohere's Tiny Aya models support over 70 langauges

item.title: Apple Podcasts is getting an enhanced video experience this spring
item.description: By bringing an enhanced video podcasts viewing experience to its app, Apple is aiming to keep users from turning to rival platforms to watch their fav...

item.title: India bids to attract over $200B in AI infrastructure investment by 2028
item.description: India is ramping up shared AI compute, adding 20,000 GPUs as part of a broader push to attract global AI investment.

item.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, inclu...

item.title: Here are the 17 US-based AI companies that have raised $100m or more in 2026
item.description: Three U.S.-based AI companies raised rounds larger than $1 billion so far in 2026 with 14 others raising rounds of $100 million or more.

item.title: The Small English Town Swept Up in the Global AI Arms Race
item.description: The residents of Potters Bar are working to protect the “green belt” of farms, forests, and meadows that surround London from the endless demand for A...

item.title: Amazon Fire TV’s new interface is now rolling out in the U.S.
item.description: Fire TV's new interface simplifies its layout and navigation and adds Alexa+.

item.title: Flapping Airplanes on the future of AI: ‘We want to try really radically different things’
item.description: "We're exploring a different set of tradeoffs."

item.title: Have money, will travel: a16z’s hunt for the next European unicorn
item.description: According to a16z, it has eyes around the world in order to spot companies as early as local funds might.

item.title: How Ricursive Intelligence raised $335M at a $4B valuation in 4 months
item.description: The reason why this nascent startup had VCs lining up is the founders.They are so famed in the AI world, everyone tried to hire them.
